title: coreopsis mutica var. genuina
intro: Coreopsis mutica var. genuina is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, commonly known as the plains coreopsis or thread-leaf tickseed. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Coreopsis mutica var. genuina include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or tea, and its roots and leaves can be used to make a tincture or powder for medicinal purposes.
